questions.question: How do I book a makeup artist on Melsta?
questions.answer: Browse artists, select your preferred service, choose your date & time, and confirm your booking directly through Melsta.

questions.question: Are Melsta artists verified?
questions.answer: Yes. All Melsta artists go through profile verification, portfolio review, and skill assessment before onboarding.

questions.question: Can I choose my preferred artist?
questions.answer: Absolutely. You can explore artist profiles, portfolios, pricing, and select the artist that best matches your style.

questions.question: Which makeup brands do Melsta artists use?
questions.answer: Melsta artists use professional and trusted beauty brands. Product choices may vary depending on the artist and service selected.

questions.question: What is the cancellation and refund policy?
questions.answer: You can cancel or reschedule based on Melsta's cancellation policy. Refund eligibility depends on the timing of cancellation.

questions.question: How do I book a service on Melsta?
questions.answer: Simply browse artists, choose your preferred service, select a date & time, and confirm your booking.

questions.question: Can I book same-day appointments?
questions.answer: Same-day bookings are available based on artist availability in your location.

questions.question: Can I reschedule my booking?
questions.answer: Yes, bookings can be rescheduled within the allowed rescheduling window.

questions.question: Can I cancel my booking?
questions.answer: Yes. Cancellation policies may vary depending on the booking type and timing.

questions.question: How will I know my booking is confirmed?
questions.answer: You'll receive a confirmation notification once your booking is successfully confirmed.

questions.question: Can I book services for multiple people?
questions.answer: Yes, group and multiple-person bookings are supported for selected services.

questions.question: Can I add services after booking?
questions.answer: Yes, additional services can be added based on artist availability.

questions.question: How early should I book my appointment?
questions.answer: For weekends, weddings, or special occasions, we recommend booking in advance to secure your preferred artist.

questions.question: Are Melsta artists verified?
questions.answer: Yes. Every artist undergoes profile verification and portfolio evaluation before onboarding.

questions.question: Can I choose my preferred artist?
questions.answer: Yes, you can browse and book artists based on style, experience, pricing, and availability.

questions.question: Can I view the artist's previous work?
questions.answer: Yes. Artist portfolios are available on their profiles for you to explore before booking.

questions.question: How does Melsta select artists?
questions.answer: Artists are shortlisted based on experience, skills, professionalism, and portfolio quality.

questions.question: Can I talk to the artist before the appointment?
questions.answer: For selected services, consultation options may be available before the booking date.

questions.question: What if my artist cancels?
questions.answer: Our team will help arrange a suitable replacement artist based on availability.

questions.question: Do artists bring their own products and tools?
questions.answer: Yes, artists arrive with the required products and professional tools for the booked service.

questions.question: Can I book the same artist again?
questions.answer: Yes, you can rebook your preferred artist through their profile.

questions.question: What makeup services are available on Melsta?
questions.answer: Melsta offers makeup, hairstyling, saree draping, party looks, bridal services, and more.

questions.question: Can I show inspiration or reference pictures?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Sharing reference images helps artists understand your preferred look better.

questions.question: Do artists work with all skin tones and skin types?
questions.answer: Yes. Melsta artists are experienced in working with different skin tones and skin types.

questions.question: Which makeup brands are used?
questions.answer: Artists use professional-grade and trusted beauty products depending on the service and artist preference.

questions.question: Are products hygienic and safe?
questions.answer: Yes. Artists are expected to follow proper hygiene and sanitation practices for tools and products.

questions.question: Can I request specific products or brands?
questions.answer: You may discuss product preferences directly with the artist before your appointment.

questions.question: Do you provide hairstyling and saree draping?
questions.answer: Yes, hairstyling and draping services are available for selected bookings.

questions.question: Are lashes included in the service?
questions.answer: Lash availability may vary depending on the package or artist selected.

questions.question: Why do prices vary between artists?
questions.answer: Pricing may vary based on the artist's experience, expertise, service type, and package inclusions.

questions.question: Are there any hidden charges?
questions.answer: No. Pricing and applicable charges are shown during the booking process.

questions.question: Is advance payment required?
questions.answer: Yes, bookings do require partial or advance payment to confirm the appointment.

questions.question: Which payment methods are accepted?
questions.answer: Melsta supports secure online payment methods available during checkout.

questions.question: Are refunds available?
questions.answer: Refund eligibility depends on the cancellation timeline and applicable policies.

questions.question: Is travel included in the pricing?
questions.answer: Travel charges may vary depending on the artist's location and service area.

questions.question: Will I receive a payment confirmation?
questions.answer: Yes, payment confirmations are shared once the transaction is successful.

questions.question: Are there extra charges for early morning bookings?
questions.answer: Additional charges may apply for early morning or late-night bookings.

questions.question: Is it safe to book artists through Melsta?
questions.answer: Melsta prioritizes customer safety through artist verification and secure booking processes.

questions.question: How can I contact customer support?
questions.answer: You can reach out to Melsta support through the app or website support section.

questions.question: What if I face an issue during the appointment?
questions.answer: Please contact Melsta support immediately, and our team will assist you.

questions.question: Will my personal information remain private?
questions.answer: Yes. Customer information is handled securely and used only for booking-related purposes.

questions.question: What happens if the artist is late?
questions.answer: Our support team will coordinate with the artist and keep you updated in case of delays.

questions.question: Can I report inappropriate behavior or concerns?
questions.answer: Yes. Customer concerns can be reported directly to Melsta support for immediate review.

questions.question: Does Melsta offer support after booking?
questions.answer: Yes. Support is available before, during, and after your appointment.

questions.question: How do I raise a complaint or feedback?
questions.answer: Feedback and concerns can be submitted through the support section in the app or website.
